---
title: "Nicola Borri"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="description" content="Official website of Nicola Borri, Associate Professor of Finance and Lian Group Chair in Blockchain Technology and Fintech at Luiss University.">
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.nicolaborri.com/">
        <meta property="og:title" content="Nicola Borri">
        <meta property="og:description" content="Official website of Nicola Borri, Associate Professor of Finance and Lian Group Chair in Blockchain Technology and Fintech at Luiss University.">
        <meta property="og:type" content="profile">
        <meta property="og:url" content="https://www.nicolaborri.com/">
        <meta property="og:image" content="https://www.nicolaborri.com/assets/img/nicola-borri.jpg">
        <script type="application/ld+json">
        {
          "@context": "https://schema.org",
          "@graph": [
            {
              "@type": "WebSite",
              "@id": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/#website",
              "url": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/",
              "name": "Nicola Borri",
              "description": "Official website of Nicola Borri, Associate Professor of Finance and Lian Group Chair in Blockchain Technology and Fintech at Luiss University."
            },
            {
              "@type": "Person",
              "@id": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/#person",
              "name": "Nicola Borri",
              "url": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/",
              "image": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/assets/img/nicola-borri.jpg",
              "email": "mailto:nborri@luiss.it",
              "jobTitle": [
                "Associate Professor of Finance",
                "Lian Group Chair in Blockchain Technology and Fintech"
              ],
              "affiliation": {
                "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
                "name": "Luiss University",
                "url": "https://www.luiss.edu/"
              },
              "sameAs": [
                "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Z4QMV08AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao",
                "https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=1131728",
                "https://arxiv.org/search/econ?searchtype=author&query=Borri,+N",
                "https://twitter.com/nicolaborri"
              ]
            },
            {
              "@type": "ProfilePage",
              "@id": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/#profile-page",
              "url": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/",
              "name": "Nicola Borri",
              "mainEntity": {
                "@id": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/#person"
              },
              "isPartOf": {
                "@id": "https://www.nicolaborri.com/#website"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
        </script>
---

::: {.wrapper}
::: {.main-section}

# Nicola Borri

<div class="subtitle">
Associate Professor of Finance<br>
Lian Group Chair in Blockchain Technology and Fintech<br>
Luiss University
</div>

### CV

[My CV is available here.](assets/cv/Nicola_Borri_CV.pdf)

### Research

[My research is listed here.](research.qmd)

### Data & Code

[Data and code resources are listed here.](data-code.qmd)

### Discussions

[Discussion slides are listed here.](discussions.qmd)

### Policy & Media

[Policy writings and media pieces are listed here.](policy-media.qmd)

### Profiles

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Z4QMV08AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)<br>
[SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=1131728)<br>
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/search/econ?searchtype=author&query=Borri,+N)

### Contact

Email: nborri[at]luiss[dot]it<br>
Twitter: [@nicolaborri](https://twitter.com/nicolaborri)

:::
::: {.sidenav}
{{< include _includes/sidebar.qmd >}}
:::
:::
